summary: Beta release on top of cloud V0.15.2 that restores Supabase Auth SDK login and closes login access for inactive or terminated employees.

notes: Login now uses the self-hosted Supabase Auth client via signInWithPassword.
Login-name, display-name, employee-name, and employee-number aliases are resolved to the linked GoTrue email before Supabase Auth login.
Existing sessions for inactive or terminated employees are treated as unauthenticated during bootstrap.
The application proxy supports Supabase SDK paths /auth/v1 and /rest/v1 while preserving existing /auth and /rest compatibility.
Password token requests proxied through /auth/v1/token are blocked when the linked profile, employee, or employment profile is inactive or terminated.
Authenticated bootstrap requests can read the current user's user_roles rows through PostgREST.

deployment.nas: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION="V0.15.2 Beta1" and rebuild attendance-module with IMAGE_TAG=V0.15.2-Beta1.
deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION="V0.15.2 Beta1" and rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.15.2-Beta1 after NAS validation.

verification: Run TypeScript build with VITE_APP_VERSION="V0.15.2 Beta1".
Verify NAS application container is healthy after rebuild.
Verify /api/login is no longer served and /auth/v1/settings remains available.
